svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;

box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 28px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: nowrap;
